title: Luceco LED Tilting Torch Light with USB Power Bank, 2 Light Modes, Rechargeable, Black, IK05, 5W, 450lm, 6500K, LILT45T65
features: A PORTABLE, RECHARGEABLE 5W TILT LED INSPECTION TORCH WITH 2 LIGHTING MODES: Offering two lighting modes from the torch head and side (450lm) of cool white light (6500K) for versatility. 25,000 hours LED life

HANDS-FREE OPERATION AND VERSATILE ATTACHMENT: The 200° tilting magnetic base and foldout hook offer versatile positioning options for hands-free operation. Ideal for domestic, professional and recreational use
CONVENIENT CHARGING VIA USB TYPE-C PORT WITH THE CHARGING CABLE PROVIDED: Integrated power bank for charging devices on the go. Long-life 2000 mAh battery providing up to 2 hours of light output
SINGLE SOURCE LIGHT PREVENTING MULTI-SHADOWING: Providing a clearer field of view, ideal for professional task lighting where larger lights would be impractical. Compact design for easy storage.
LUCECO 1-YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a 1-year warranty, Luceco have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
description: From the manufacturer Luceco LED USB Rechargeable Tilt Torch, 5 Watts, Black and Green When you need additional temporary and portable lighting options, from mains powered tripods and work lights, to rechargeable torches, clamps, and magnetic options When you’re working in construction environments, doing some DIY tasks, or working in the garage, you need a high-powered light you can rely on. With the USB rechargeable tilt torch with a power bank from Luceco, is designed with tradespeople and contractors in mind, but the tilt torch is a must for camping trips and when travelling on the road, as it provides flawless and bright LED lighting. More Information Measures 32 x 8 x 7 cm (12.5 x 3 x 2.75 inches) 5 Watts LED 6500K colour temperature (overcast sky) 1 Lithium ion battery required (included) Black and green Features Rechargeable Supplied with a USB charging cable, the tilt torch is inbuilt with a 2000 mAh USB power bank for charging devices at home, on the work site or even in the car. Magnetic tilting base With a strong magnetic tilting base, and a 360⁰ folding hook, it can reach and provide lighting to any awkward hard to reach angles. Robust and reliable With a durable hard-wearing housing, the tilt torch has two working light modes and a red flashing beacon. About Luceco With over 70 years experience, the Luceco plc brands of Luceco LED lighting, BG Electrical, Masterplug and Ross are market leaders in key electrical categories, offering a "one stop shop" for trade and retail accessories. With a head office in London and global offices in four continents, Luceco has an impressive portfolio of over 2,500 product lines and are continually evolving product ranges, aligned to market trends. So, whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting, top of the range extension leads, stylish socket covers or dimmer switches, Luceco is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance.
